verses.latin_vulgate: Venerunt ergo viri Cariathiarim, et reduxerunt arcam Domini, et intulerunt eam in domum Abinadab in Gabaa : Eleazarum autem filium ejus sanctificaverunt, ut custodiret arcam Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֜אוּ אַנְשֵׁ֣י ׀ קִרְיַ֣ת יְעָרִ֗ים וַֽיַּעֲלוּ֙ אֶת־אֲר֣וֹן יְהֹוָ֔ה וַיָּבִ֣אוּ אֹת֔וֹ אֶל־בֵּ֥ית אֲבִינָדָ֖ב בַּגִּבְעָ֑ה וְאֶת־אֶלְעָזָ֤ר בְּנוֹ֙ קִדְּשׁ֔וּ לִשְׁמֹ֖ר אֶת־אֲר֥וֹן יְהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And the men of Cariathiarim came, and fetched up the ark of the Lord, and carried it into the house of Abinadab, in Gabaa: and they sanctified Eleazar, his son, to keep the ark of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin tulivat KirjatJearimin miehet, ja toivat sinne Herran arkin, ja veivät sen Amminadabin huoneesen Gibeaan, ja vihkivät hänen poikansa Eleatsarin ottamaan Herran arkista vaaria.
verses.king_james: And the men of Kirjath–jearim came, and fetched up the ark of the Lord, and brought it into the house of Abinadab in the hill, and sanctified Eleazar his son to keep the ark of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et factum est, ex qua die mansit arca Domini in Cariathiarim, multiplicati sunt dies (erat quippe jam annus vigesimus), et requievit omnis domus Israël post Dominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֗י מִיּ֞וֹם שֶׁ֤בֶת הָאָרוֹן֙ בְּקִרְיַ֣ת יְעָרִ֔ים וַיִּרְבּוּ֙ הַיָּמִ֔ים וַיִּהְי֖וּ עֶשְׂרִ֣ים שָׁנָ֑ה וַיִּנָּה֛וּ כׇּל־בֵּ֥ית יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל אַחֲרֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And it came to pass, that from the day the ark of the Lord abode in Cariathiarim, days were multiplied (for it was now the twentieth year) and all the house of Israel rested, following the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja siitä päivästä, jona arkki tuli KirjatJearimiin, kului paljon aikaa, kaksikymmentä ajastaikaa; ja koko Israelin huone itki Herran jälkeen.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, while the ark abode in Kirjath–jearim, that the time was long; for it was twenty years: and all the house of Israel lamented after the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ait autem Samuel ad universam domum Israël, dicens : Si in toto corde vestro revertimini ad Dominum, auferte deos alienos de medio vestri, Baalim et Astaroth : et præparate corda vestra Domino, et servite ei soli, et eruet vos de manu Philisthiim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר שְׁמוּאֵ֗ל אֶל־כׇּל־בֵּ֣ית יִשְׂרָאֵל֮ לֵאמֹר֒ אִם־בְּכׇל־לְבַבְכֶ֗ם אַתֶּ֤ם שָׁבִים֙ אֶל־יְהֹוָ֔ה הָסִ֜ירוּ אֶת־אֱלֹהֵ֧י הַנֵּכָ֛ר מִתּוֹכְכֶ֖ם וְהָעַשְׁתָּר֑וֹת וְהָכִ֨ינוּ לְבַבְכֶ֤ם אֶל־יְהֹוָה֙ וְעִבְדֻ֣הוּ לְבַדּ֔וֹ וְיַצֵּ֥ל אֶתְכֶ֖ם מִיַּ֥ד פְּלִשְׁתִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Samuel spoke to all the house of Israel, saying: If you turn to the Lord with all your heart, put away the strange gods from among you, Baalim and Astaroth: and prepare your hearts unto the Lord, and serve him only, and he will deliver you out of the hand of the Philistines.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Samuel puhui koko Israelin huoneelle, sanoen: jos te käännätte teitänne kaikesta sydämestänne Herran tykö, niin heittäkäät teiltänne vieraat jumalat ja Astharot pois, ja valmistakaat teidän sydämenne Herran tykö, ja palvelkaat häntä ainoaa, niin hän pelastaa teidät Philistealaisten käsistä.
verses.king_james: And Samuel spake unto all the house of Israel, saying, If ye do return unto the Lord with all your hearts, then put away the strange gods and Ashtaroth from among you, and prepare your hearts unto the Lord, and serve him only: and he will deliver you out of the hand of the Philistines.

verses.latin_vulgate: Abstulerunt ergo filii Israël Baalim et Astaroth, et servierunt Domino soli.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּסִ֙ירוּ֙ בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל אֶת־הַבְּעָלִ֖ים וְאֶת־הָעַשְׁתָּרֹ֑ת וַיַּעַבְד֥וּ אֶת־יְהֹוָ֖ה לְבַדּֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Then the children of Israel put away Baalim and Astaroth, and served the Lord only.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin heittivät Israelin lapset heiltänsä Baalin ja Astharotin pois, ja palvelivat ainoaa Herraa.
verses.king_james: Then the children of Israel did put away Baalim and Ashtaroth, and served the Lord only.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixit autem Samuel : Congregate universum Israël in Masphath, ut orem pro vobis Dominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר שְׁמוּאֵ֔ל קִבְצ֥וּ אֶת־כׇּל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל הַמִּצְפָּ֑תָה וְאֶתְפַּלֵּ֥ל בַּעַדְכֶ֖ם אֶל־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Samuel said: Gather all Israel to Masphath, that I may pray to the Lord for you.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Samuel sanoi: kootkaat kaikki Israel Mitspaan: ja minä rukoilen teidän edestänne Herraa.
verses.king_james: And Samuel said, Gather all Israel to Mizpeh, and I will pray for you unto the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et convenerunt in Masphath : hauseruntque aquam, et effuderunt in conspectu Domini : et jejunaverunt in die illa atque dixerunt ibi : Peccavimus Domino. Judicavitque Samuel filios Israël in Masphath.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקָּבְצ֣וּ הַ֠מִּצְפָּ֠תָה וַיִּֽשְׁאֲבוּ־מַ֜יִם וַֽיִּשְׁפְּכ֣וּ ׀ לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֗ה וַיָּצ֙וּמוּ֙ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֔וּא וַיֹּ֣אמְרוּ שָׁ֔ם חָטָ֖אנוּ לַֽיהֹוָ֑ה וַיִּשְׁפֹּ֧ט שְׁמוּאֵ֛ל אֶת־בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל בַּמִּצְפָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they gathered together to Masphath, and they drew water, and poured it out before the Lord, and they fasted on that day, and they said there: We have sinned against the Lord. And Samuel judged the children of Israel in Masphath.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he tulivat Mitspaan kokoon, ammunsivat vettä ja kaasivat Herran eteen, paastosivat sen päivän, ja sanoivat siinä paikassa: me olemme syntiä tehneet Herraa vastaan! Ja Samuel tuomitsi Israelin lapsia Mitspassa.
verses.king_james: And they gathered together to Mizpeh, and drew water, and poured it out before the Lord, and fasted on that day, and said there, We have sinned against the Lord. And Samuel judged the children of Israel in Mizpeh.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et audierunt Philisthiim quod congregati essent filii Israël in Masphath, et ascenderunt satrapæ Philisthinorum ad Israël. Quod cum audissent filii Israël, timuerunt a facie Philisthinorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁמְע֣וּ פְלִשְׁתִּ֗ים כִּֽי־הִתְקַבְּצ֤וּ בְנֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ הַמִּצְפָּ֔תָה וַיַּעֲל֥וּ סַרְנֵֽי־פְלִשְׁתִּ֖ים אֶל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַֽיִּשְׁמְעוּ֙ בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וַיִּֽרְא֖וּ מִפְּנֵ֥י פְלִשְׁתִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Philistines heard that the children of Israel were gathered together to Masphath, and the lords of the Philistines went up against Israel. And when the children of Israel heard this, they were afraid of the Philistines.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Philistealaiset kuulivat Israelin lapset kokoontuneeksi Mitspaan, menivät Philistealaisten päämiehet Israelia vastaan. Kuin Israelin lapset sen kuulivat, pelkäsivät he Philistealaisia.
verses.king_james: And when the Philistines heard that the children of Israel were gathered together to Mizpeh, the lords of the Philistines went up against Israel. And when the children of Israel heard it, they were afraid of the Philistines.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixeruntque ad Samuelem : Ne cesses pro nobis clamare ad Dominum Deum nostrum, ut salvet nos de manu Philisthinorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּאמְר֤וּ בְנֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ אֶל־שְׁמוּאֵ֔ל אַל־תַּחֲרֵ֣שׁ מִמֶּ֔נּוּ מִזְּעֹ֖ק אֶל־יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֵ֑ינוּ וְיֹשִׁעֵ֖נוּ מִיַּ֥ד פְּלִשְׁתִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they said to Samuel: Cease not to cry to the Lord our God for us, that he may save us out of the hand of the Philistines.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Israelin lapset sanoivat Samuelille: älä lakkaa huutamasta meidän edestämme Herran meidän Jumalamme tykö, että hän meidät pelastais Philistealaisten käsistä.
verses.king_james: And the children of Israel said to Samuel, Cease not to cry unto the Lord our God for us, that he will save us out of the hand of the Philistines.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tulit autem Samuel agnum lactentem unum, et obtulit illum holocaustum integrum Domino : et clamavit Samuel ad Dominum pro Israël, et exaudivit eum Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקַּ֣ח שְׁמוּאֵ֗ל טְלֵ֤ה חָלָב֙ אֶחָ֔ד (ויעלה) [וַיַּֽעֲלֵ֧הוּ] עוֹלָ֛ה כָּלִ֖יל לַיהֹוָ֑ה וַיִּזְעַ֨ק שְׁמוּאֵ֤ל אֶל־יְהֹוָה֙ בְּעַ֣ד יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וַֽיַּעֲנֵ֖הוּ יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Samuel took a sucking lamb, and offered it whole for a holocaust to the Lord: and Samuel cried to the Lord for Israel, and the Lord heard him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Samuel otti yhden imevän karitsan ja uhrasi sen kokonansa Herralle polttouhriksi; ja Samuel huusi Herran tykö Israelin edestä, ja Herra kuuli hänen rukouksensa.
verses.king_james: And Samuel took a sucking lamb, and offered it for a burnt offering wholly unto the Lord: and Samuel cried unto the Lord for Israel; and the Lord heard him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Factum est autem, cum Samuel offerret holocaustum, Philisthiim iniere prælium contra Israël : intonuit autem Dominus fragore magno in die illa super Philisthiim, et exterruit eos, et cæsi sunt a facie Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֤י שְׁמוּאֵל֙ מַעֲלֶ֣ה הָעוֹלָ֔ה וּפְלִשְׁתִּ֣ים נִגְּשׁ֔וּ לַמִּלְחָמָ֖ה בְּיִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַיַּרְעֵ֣ם יְהֹוָ֣ה בְּקוֹל־גָּ֠ד֠וֹל בַּיּ֨וֹם הַה֤וּא עַל־פְּלִשְׁתִּים֙ וַיְהֻמֵּ֔ם וַיִּנָּגְפ֖וּ לִפְנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it came to pass, when Samuel was offering the holocaust, the Philistines began the battle against Israel: but the Lord thundered with a great thunder on that day upon the Philistines, and terrified them, and they were overthrown before the face of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin Samuel uhrasi polttouhrin, lähestyivät Philistealaiset sotimaan Israelia vastaan; mutta Herra jylisti sinä päivänä suurella pauhinalla Philistealaisten ylitse ja peljätti heidät, niin että he lyötiin Israelin edessä.
verses.king_james: And as Samuel was offering up the burnt offering, the Philistines drew near to battle against Israel: but the Lord thundered with a great thunder on that day upon the Philistines, and discomfited them; and they were smitten before Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egressique viri Israël de Masphath, persecuti sunt Philisthæos, et percusserunt eos usque ad locum qui erat subter Bethchar.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֨צְא֜וּ אַנְשֵׁ֤י יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ מִן־הַמִּצְפָּ֔ה וַֽיִּרְדְּפ֖וּ אֶת־פְּלִשְׁתִּ֑ים וַיַּכּ֕וּם עַד־מִתַּ֖חַת לְבֵ֥ית כָּֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the men of Israel going out of Masphath, pursued after the Philistines, and made slaughter of them till they came under Bethchar.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Israelin miehet menivät ulos Mitspasta, ja ajoivat Philistealaisia takaa, ja löivät heidät aina BetKarin alle.
verses.king_james: And the men of Israel went out of Mizpeh, and pursued the Philistines, and smote them, until they came under Beth–car.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tulit autem Samuel lapidem unum, et posuit eum inter Masphath et inter Sen : et vocavit nomen loci illius, Lapis adjutorii. Dixitque : Hucusque auxiliatus est nobis Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקַּ֨ח שְׁמוּאֵ֜ל אֶ֣בֶן אַחַ֗ת וַיָּ֤שֶׂם בֵּֽין־הַמִּצְפָּה֙ וּבֵ֣ין הַשֵּׁ֔ן וַיִּקְרָ֥א אֶת־שְׁמָ֖הּ אֶ֣בֶן הָעָ֑זֶר וַיֹּאמַ֕ר עַד־הֵ֖נָּה עֲזָרָ֥נוּ יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Samuel took a stone, and laid it between Masphath and Sen: and he called the place The stone of help. And he said: Thus far the Lord hath helped us.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Samuel otti kiven ja pani Mitspan ja Senin välille, ja kutsui sen nimen EbenEtser, ja sanoi: tähän asti on Herra auttanut meitä.
verses.king_james: Then Samuel took a stone, and set it between Mizpeh and Shen, and called the name of it Eben–ezer, saying, Hitherto hath the Lord helped us.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et humiliati sunt Philisthiim, nec apposuerunt ultra ut venirent in terminos Israël. Facta est itaque manus Domini super Philisthæos cunctis diebus Samuelis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּכָּֽנְעוּ֙ הַפְּלִשְׁתִּ֔ים וְלֹֽא־יָסְפ֣וּ ע֔וֹד לָב֖וֹא בִּגְב֣וּל יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַתְּהִ֤י יַד־יְהֹוָה֙ בַּפְּלִשְׁתִּ֔ים כֹּ֖ל יְמֵ֥י שְׁמוּאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Philistines were humbled, and they did not come any more into the borders of Israel. And the hand of the Lord was against the Philistines, all the days of Samuel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja niin Philistealaiset poljettiin, eikä enää tulleet Israelin rajoille. Ja Herran käsi oli Philistealaisia vastaan niinkauvan kuin Samuel eli.
verses.king_james: So the Philistines were subdued, and they came no more into the coast of Israel: and the hand of the Lord was against the Philistines all the days of Samuel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et redditæ sunt urbes quas tulerant Philisthiim ab Israël, Israëli, ab Accaron usque Geth, et terminos suos : liberavitque Israël de manu Philisthinorum, eratque pax inter Israël et Amorrhæum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתָּשֹׁ֣בְנָה הֶעָרִ֡ים אֲשֶׁ֣ר לָֽקְחוּ־פְלִשְׁתִּים֩ מֵאֵ֨ת יִשְׂרָאֵ֤ל ׀ לְיִשְׂרָאֵל֙ מֵעֶקְר֣וֹן וְעַד־גַּ֔ת וְאֶ֨ת־גְּבוּלָ֔ן הִצִּ֥יל יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל מִיַּ֣ד פְּלִשְׁתִּ֑ים וַיְהִ֣י שָׁל֔וֹם בֵּ֥ין יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל וּבֵ֥ין הָאֱמֹרִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the cities which the Philistines had taken from Israel, were restored to Israel, from Accaron to Geth, and their borders: and he delivered Israel from the hand of the Philistines, and there was peace between Israel and the Amorrhites.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Israelin lapset saivat ne kaupungit jälleen, jotka Philistealaiset heiltä olivat ottaneet pois, Ekronista Gatiin saakka, rajoinensa. Ne vapahti Israel Philistealaisten käsistä; sillä Israelilla oli rauha Amorilaisten kanssa.
verses.king_james: And the cities which the Philistines had taken from Israel were restored to Israel, from Ekron even unto Gath; and the coasts thereof did Israel deliver out of the hands of the Philistines. And there was peace between Israel and the Amorites.

verses.latin_vulgate: Judicabat quoque Samuel Israëlem cunctis diebus vitæ suæ :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁפֹּ֤ט שְׁמוּאֵל֙ אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל כֹּ֖ל יְמֵ֥י חַיָּֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Samuel judged Israel all the days of his life:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Samuel tuomitsi Israelia kaiken elinaikansa,
verses.king_james: And Samuel judged Israel all the days of his life.

verses.latin_vulgate: et ibat per singulos annos circuiens Bethel et Galgala et Masphath, et judicabat Israëlem in supradictis locis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָלַ֗ךְ מִדֵּ֤י שָׁנָה֙ בְּשָׁנָ֔ה וְסָבַב֙ בֵּֽית־אֵ֔ל וְהַגִּלְגָּ֖ל וְהַמִּצְפָּ֑ה וְשָׁפַט֙ אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל אֵ֥ת כׇּל־הַמְּקוֹמ֖וֹת הָאֵֽלֶּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he went every year about to Bethel and to Galgal and to Masphath, and he judged Israel in the foresaid places.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja vaelsi joka vuosi ympäri BetElin ja Gilgalin ja Mitspan. Ja kuin hän oli tuominnut Israelia kaikissa näissä paikoissa,
verses.king_james: And he went from year to year in circuit to Beth–el, and Gilgal, and Mizpeh, and judged Israel in all those places.

verses.latin_vulgate: Revertebaturque in Ramatha : ibi enim erat domus ejus, et ibi judicabat Israëlem : ædificavit etiam ibi altare Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּתְשֻׁבָת֤וֹ הָרָמָ֙תָה֙ כִּֽי־שָׁ֣ם בֵּית֔וֹ וְשָׁ֖ם שָׁפָ֣ט אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַיִּבֶן־שָׁ֥ם מִזְבֵּ֖חַ לַיהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And he returned to Ramatha: for there was his house, and there he judged Israel: he built also there an altar to the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tuli hän Ramaan jälleen; sillä siellä oli hänen huoneensa ja siellä hän tuomitsi Israelia, ja rakensi Herralle siellä alttarin.
verses.king_james: And his return was to Ramah; for there was his house; and there he judged Israel; and there he built an altar unto the Lord.
